SDK: useInViewOnce as callback ref (exposure fires for late-mounting elements)

Found by the G2 live exposure probe: the effect-based hook looked for its
element only at component mount, so an experiment surface rendered after
client-side variant resolution never recorded exposure. Callback ref attaches
the observer whenever the element appears.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Fable 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
